filePatterns.item: - [ ] Prisma schema changes have been validated and migrations created if needed
- [ ] Component changes have been tested in different browsers/devices
- [ ] API changes have been tested and documented
- [ ] UI changes look good on all screen sizes
- [ ] Tests are meaningful and cover critical paths
- [ ] No secrets committed, environment variables documented
- [ ] Database migrations are tested and have rollback plan
- [ ] Dependency injection and error handling reviewed

contentPatterns.item: - [ ] React hooks usage has been reviewed for potential issues (dependencies, cleanup)
- [ ] API calls include proper error handling and timeout configuration
- [ ] Security-sensitive code has been reviewed for vulnerabilities
- [ ] Database operations use transactions where needed and handle errors
- [ ] Debug statements removed or replaced with proper logging
- [ ] Technical debt markers addressed or justified
- [ ] Type safety maintained, type assertions justified
- [ ] Environment variables are validated and have defaults where appropriate
- [ ] Exceptions are caught and handled appropriately
- [ ] Async operations are properly awaited and errors handled
